title: CHIPS Act Update Gives Bears the Upper Hand With Chip Stocks
text: Semiconductor stocks rose over the weekend after details emerged on how the CHIPS and Science Act will be allocated. According to the Department of Commerce, $28 billion will support manufacturing of advanced chips, $10 billion into making current chips, and $11 billion into research and development.
